'''tajuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mbege|mbege]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-j-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mbege|mbege]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tajuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæjichith|tæjichith]] || [[word:tæjichij|tæjichij]] || [[word:tæjichish|tæjichish]] || [[word:tæjichi|tæjichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tajujuchuth|tajujuchuth]] || [[word:tajujuchuj|tajujuchuj]] || [[word:tajujuchush|tajujuchush]] || [[word:tajujuchu|tajujuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tajuchuth|tajuchuth]] || [[word:tajuchuj|tajuchuj]] || [[word:tajuchush|tajuchush]] || [[word:tajuchu|tajuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tajufchuth|tajufchuth]] || [[word:tajufchuj|tajufchuj]] || [[word:tajufchush|tajufchush]] || [[word:tajufchuf|tajufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tajuchuthu|tajuchuthu]] || [[word:tajuchuju|tajuchuju]] || [[word:tajuchushu|tajuchushu]] || [[word:tajuchuku|tajuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tajuchuth|tajuchuth]] || [[word:tajuchuj|tajuchuj]] || [[word:tajuchush|tajuchush]] || [[word:tajuchu|tajuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tajuchuthul|tajuchuthul]] || [[word:tajuchujul|tajuchujul]] || [[word:tajuchushul|tajuchushul]] || [[word:tajuchukul|tajuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tajuchuthuthu|tajuchuthuthu]] || [[word:tajuchujuju|tajuchujuju]] || [[word:tajuchushushu|tajuchushushu]] || [[word:tajuchuku|tajuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tajuchuthun|tajuchuthun]] || [[word:tajuchujun|tajuchujun]] || [[word:tajuchushun|tajuchushun]] || [[word:tajuchukun|tajuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tajuchuthuoro|tajuchuthuoro]] || [[word:tajuchujuoro|tajuchujuoro]] || [[word:tajuchushuoro|tajuchushuoro]] || [[word:tajuchukuoro|tajuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
